title: Claim
description: An atomic claim extracted from the report. claim_id = sha256(section_id + sentence_text)[:16].

claim_type.description: Only factual claims hard-fail on lack of support

cited_source_ids.description: Stable source_ids cited for this claim

evidence_ids.description: Evidence rows that support this claim

support_status.description: Set by verify_claim_support.py. 'unsupported' blocks delivery in deep/ultradeep.

_citation_numbers.description: Display-number citations [N] found on this claim in the draft. Written by extract_claims.py; underscore-prefixed because display numbers are render-time state, not stable identity.

_support_score.description: Lexical overlap between claim text and its best-matching evidence span (0-1). Written by verify_claim_support.py; diagnostic only.

_support_notes.description: Human-readable rationale for the support_status. Written by verify_claim_support.py.
